privileged_info_summary: The task creates a Bank Statement in iDempiere (an open-source ERP system with real bank statement functionality per iDempiere wiki) with the name 'Dec 2024 Mid-Month Statement' dated 2024-12-15. It contains exactly 3 transaction lines: (1) 2024-12-02 'Wire deposit from Seed Farm Inc' for 5250.00, (2) 2024-12-08 'Monthly bank service fee' for -35.00, and (3) 2024-12-12 'ACH deposit Patio Furniture' for 12780.50. All metadata values are internally consistent across task definition, verification script, and execution scripts. The transaction data is synthetic test data created for this ERP task benchmark, not from actual banking records.
